Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants two POWL models for GlobalTeq Solutions hiring process one with potential unfairness and one without

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The hiring has multiple stages application receipt resume parsing with data check loop skill assessment cultural fit check where bias might occur and managerial review

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The bias comes from an XOR branch where some applicants get a community affiliation check that gives them an advantage

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the first model with unfairness I need to include that XOR branch After skill assessment there should be an exclusive choice between standard cultural fit evaluation and the community affiliation check

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the structure would be ReceiveApplication then DataCompletenessCheck with loop then SkillAssessment then XOR CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck then ManagerialReview then FinalDecision

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: the DataCompletenessCheck has a loop In the description if resume is incomplete it loops back to request more info

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: that should be a LOOP operator between DataCompletenessCheck and RequestMoreInfo

Name: Validation - PE
Text: In POWL the loop operator means execute A then either exit or execute B then A again So for data completeness first DataCompletenessCheck then if need more info RequestMoreInfo then back to DataCompletenessCheck

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then after data is complete we move to SkillAssessment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then after SkillAssessment the XOR branch one path is standard CulturalFitCheck the other is CommunityAffiliationCheck Then both paths converge to ManagerialReview and FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: the description says either you go through a standard cultural fit assessment or you take a path where community affiliation leads to implicit score adjustments So it is an exclusive choice

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the fair model we remove the XOR branch So instead of having a choice all applicants go through the same CulturalFitCheck

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: the process would be after SkillAssessment directly to CulturalFitCheck no XOR then ManagerialReview then FinalDecision

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Define the activities ReceiveApplication DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck only in unfair model ManagerialReview FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The full sequence for the unfair model is ReceiveApplication then loop data then SkillAssessment then xor cultural then ManagerialReview then FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For fair model after SkillAssessment it is just CulturalFitCheck no XOR

Name: Validation - PE
Text: in the fair model we do not have CommunityAffiliationCheck activity because all applicants undergo the same cultural fit evaluation process
